## Meeting Purpose

[Strategize on improving client relationships and service delivery for Home Base, while discussing broader business model optimization.](https://fathom.video/share/KLbeXD7nUHFwaeTnNTssZAJENznsi6Ft?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Need to realign Home Base strategy: create comprehensive competitor analysis, present 12-month roadmap](https://fathom.video/share/KLbeXD7nUHFwaeTnNTssZAJENznsi6Ft?tab=summary&timestamp=4.0)
  - [Address Carrie's influence: consider offering consulting to mitigate potential conflicts](https://fathom.video/share/KLbeXD7nUHFwaeTnNTssZAJENznsi6Ft?tab=summary&timestamp=14.0)
  - [Shift focus: 80% bandwidth towards glossary project, 20% editorial content](https://fathom.video/share/KLbeXD7nUHFwaeTnNTssZAJENznsi6Ft?tab=summary&timestamp=63.0)
  - [Business model vision: Scale to $15-30k/mo clients, 70% margin, partners managing 10-20 accounts each](https://fathom.video/share/KLbeXD7nUHFwaeTnNTssZAJENznsi6Ft?tab=summary&timestamp=1057.0)

## Topics

### Home Base Strategy Realignment

  - [Conduct thorough competitive analysis (similar to Boost My School approach)](https://fathom.video/share/KLbeXD7nUHFwaeTnNTssZAJENznsi6Ft?tab=summary&timestamp=402.0)
      - [Analyze 20+ competitors, create massive database of opportunities](https://fathom.video/share/KLbeXD7nUHFwaeTnNTssZAJENznsi6Ft?tab=summary&timestamp=449.0)
      - [Filter by relevance score, align with Home Base product categories](https://fathom.video/share/KLbeXD7nUHFwaeTnNTssZAJENznsi6Ft?tab=summary&timestamp=597.0)
  - [Develop 12-month roadmap with specific projects:](https://fathom.video/share/KLbeXD7nUHFwaeTnNTssZAJENznsi6Ft?tab=summary&timestamp=752.0)
      - [Glossary (similar to Rippling)](https://fathom.video/share/KLbeXD7nUHFwaeTnNTssZAJENznsi6Ft?tab=summary&timestamp=787.0)
      - [Calculators (provide data for Home Base to build)](https://fathom.video/share/KLbeXD7nUHFwaeTnNTssZAJENznsi6Ft?tab=summary&timestamp=787.0)
      - [Programmatic SEO process (increase volume on existing articles)](https://fathom.video/share/KLbeXD7nUHFwaeTnNTssZAJENznsi6Ft?tab=summary&timestamp=801.0)
  - [Present strategy as "take it or leave it" with 30-day decision window](https://fathom.video/share/KLbeXD7nUHFwaeTnNTssZAJENznsi6Ft?tab=summary&timestamp=760.0)
  - [Create detailed content calendar with assignments and dates](https://fathom.video/share/KLbeXD7nUHFwaeTnNTssZAJENznsi6Ft?tab=summary&timestamp=765.0)

### Client Relationship Management

  - [Carrie potentially "poisoning the well"; consider offering consulting to create conflict of interest](https://fathom.video/share/KLbeXD7nUHFwaeTnNTssZAJENznsi6Ft?tab=summary&timestamp=21.0)
  - [Sack (tech lead) is winnable; very friendly and open to discussion](https://fathom.video/share/KLbeXD7nUHFwaeTnNTssZAJENznsi6Ft?tab=summary&timestamp=2.0)
  - [Need to clarify strategy and direction for clients feeling confused](https://fathom.video/share/KLbeXD7nUHFwaeTnNTssZAJENznsi6Ft?tab=summary&timestamp=257.0)
  - [Automate report pulling to show keyword ranking progress](https://fathom.video/share/KLbeXD7nUHFwaeTnNTssZAJENznsi6Ft?tab=summary&timestamp=302.0)

### Content Quality and Production

  - [Shift focus: 7 new articles + 3 refreshed per week (instead of 15)](https://fathom.video/share/KLbeXD7nUHFwaeTnNTssZAJENznsi6Ft?tab=summary&timestamp=192.0)
  - [Leverage AI for multiple reprocessing steps with custom instructions](https://fathom.video/share/KLbeXD7nUHFwaeTnNTssZAJENznsi6Ft?tab=summary&timestamp=223.0)
  - [Implement human editing line item changes for quality improvement](https://fathom.video/share/KLbeXD7nUHFwaeTnNTssZAJENznsi6Ft?tab=summary&timestamp=203.0)

### Business Model Optimization

  - [Vision: Scale to $15-30k/month per client](https://fathom.video/share/KLbeXD7nUHFwaeTnNTssZAJENznsi6Ft?tab=summary&timestamp=1057.0)
  - [Partner workload: 30-min call + 30-min prep per week, per client](https://fathom.video/share/KLbeXD7nUHFwaeTnNTssZAJENznsi6Ft?tab=summary&timestamp=1064.0)
  - [Target: 10-20 clients per partner, $3.6M annual revenue potential](https://fathom.video/share/KLbeXD7nUHFwaeTnNTssZAJENznsi6Ft?tab=summary&timestamp=1080.0)
  - [70% margin goal: $1M cost spread across partner and support team](https://fathom.video/share/KLbeXD7nUHFwaeTnNTssZAJENznsi6Ft?tab=summary&timestamp=1111.0)
  - [Cluster client meetings into 2 days/week, leaving 3 days for other tasks](https://fathom.video/share/KLbeXD7nUHFwaeTnNTssZAJENznsi6Ft?tab=summary&timestamp=1166.0)

### Cost Control and Team Structure

  - [Current costs getting out of control; need to reduce](https://fathom.video/share/KLbeXD7nUHFwaeTnNTssZAJENznsi6Ft?tab=summary&timestamp=1186.0)
  - [Aim for $80k monthly revenue to enable strategic hires (Bruno, Kyle, Jason)](https://fathom.video/share/KLbeXD7nUHFwaeTnNTssZAJENznsi6Ft?tab=summary&timestamp=1192.0)
  - [Structure where partners handle accounts, minimizing involvement of junior staff](https://fathom.video/share/KLbeXD7nUHFwaeTnNTssZAJENznsi6Ft?tab=summary&timestamp=1206.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Create comprehensive competitor analysis and 12-month roadmap for Home Base](https://fathom.video/share/KLbeXD7nUHFwaeTnNTssZAJENznsi6Ft?tab=summary&timestamp=402.0)

  - [Follow up with potential clients who gave verbal commitments](https://fathom.video/share/KLbeXD7nUHFwaeTnNTssZAJENznsi6Ft?tab=summary&timestamp=989.0)
  - [Analyze current costs and develop plan to reduce expenses](https://fathom.video/share/KLbeXD7nUHFwaeTnNTssZAJENznsi6Ft?tab=summary&timestamp=1186.0)
  - [Explore raising prices to afford high-quality team members like Kyle and Bruno](https://fathom.video/share/KLbeXD7nUHFwaeTnNTssZAJENznsi6Ft?tab=summary&timestamp=1025.0)
